headline: American Electric Power (AEP) Joins Bloom Expansion To Power AI Data Centers
summary: Bloom Energy and Brookfield are expanding fuel cell infrastructure to support rising AI data center power needs. American Electric Power Company (NasdaqGS:AEP) is identified as a key partner in this global buildout. The collaboration focuses on next-generation power solutions tailored to large scale computing facilities. American Electric Power Company sits at the center of a growing push to secure reliable electricity for AI data centers, an area that requires high uptime and substantial...

headline: American Electric Power (AEP) Stock May Be 30% Above Fair Value Following Data Center Demand News
summary: American Electric Power Company stock has almost doubled investors’ money over the past five years, yet today its valuation checks send a mixed message, with the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) suggesting the share price sits at a premium while earnings based multiples lean the other way. Over 5 years, shareholders in American Electric Power Company have seen a total return of about 94%, which puts extra focus on whether the current price still leaves enough room for attractive future...
